_note: Deterministic hype-tell rules and source reputation for the news desk. This is the fail-closed BELT: a rule-based first net that runs offline and is unit-tested by the canary. The editor AI is the SUSPENDERS (Stage 2) and the verifier AI is a second, independent net (Stage 3). News translation of the family shill belt: outrage bait, unnamed-source rumor churn, conspiracy framing, and sponsored placement instead of coin shilling or betting touts. Tune over time; living file.

tells.pattern: \b(what they don'?t want you to know|the media won'?t (tell|show) you|wake up|do your own research|mainstream media is (hiding|lying)|the truth they'?re hiding)\b

tells.reason: unsourced rumor dressed in hype language

tells.pattern: \b(you won'?t believe|shocking truth|the real reason|what happened next|goes viral|breaks the internet|number \d+ will)\b
\b(sponsored|in partnership with|presented by|paid post|paid partnership|promoted|advertorial|press release distribution|prnewswire|globe ?newswire|via businesswire)\b
\b(doctors hate|miracle cure|one weird trick|this simple trick|secret (that|the)|big pharma doesn'?t)\b
\b(total(ly)? corrupt|complete hoax|utterly destroyed|proven beyond doubt|everyone knows|no one is talking about)\b
\b(allegedly said|is said to have told|per an unnamed|according to a source close to)\b
tells.reason: quote attributed to no one checkable (verify against the record)

source_reputation._note: Multiplier on a source's baseline trust. > 1 raises weight (official public record), < 1 lowers it. Editor and verifier both receive these so a single low-rep source cannot carry a top story alone. Outlet-level bias/factual ratings live separately in site/data/credibility.json and are shown to readers.

known_low_rep_domains._note: Domains with pay-for-coverage, content-mill, or fabrication reputations. Not a blocklist; a heavy weight penalty. Extend over time.

thresholds._note: shill_score >= reject_score => the pre-pass marks the item shill_rejected=true (editor still sees it, with the reason, so it can override up if the tells are a false positive on real news). >= flag_score => flagged for the editor's attention.
